effect: [On Retire] You may place 2 character cards or 1 Event card from your hand to the Outside Area. If you did, add this card to your hand.
_triggerText: Draw a card.

name: Makima
effect: If this character is active, increase this character's generated energy by 1 [red].

name: Makima
effect:
[Main][When in Frontline][1 Per Turn] Choose 1 character on your Energy Line, switch its position with this character.@
[When Attacking] Retire 1 character other than <Makima> on your area.
_triggerText: Add this card to your hand.

name: Makima
effect:
-0[Main][When in Frontline][1 Per Turn] Choose 1 character on your Energy Line, switch its position with this character.@
[When Attacking] Retire 1 character other than <Makima> on your area.

name: Future Devil
effect: [Main][Rest this card] Look at the top card of your deck, place it on top or bottom of your deck.
_triggerText: Draw a card.

name: Ghost Devil
effect: [When Attacking] If this character moved outside of your Move Phase during this turn, add up to 1 <Aki Hayakawa> with a required energy of 2 or less from your Outside Area to your hand.

name: Hayakawa House
effect: [On Play] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck, reveal up to 1 <Aki Hayakawa> or <Denji> or <Power> and add it to your hand. Place the remaining at the bottom of your deck in any order.
_triggerText: Add this card to your hand.

name: Easy revenge！
effect: Choose up to 2 of your AP cards and set them to active.
_triggerText: If you have no life: place the top card of your deck into your life area.

name: Hit It!
effect: Choose 1 character on your area, it gains +2000 BP during this turn. You may place 1 face-down card under <Aki Hayakawa> on your area to the Outside Area. If you did, set 1 of your AP cards to active, and choose up to 1 <Aki Hayakawa> on your area, it gains [Impact 1] during this turn.
_triggerText: Draw a card.

name: In Exchange...Show Me Your Dreams Denji
effect:
5Choose 1 of the following.@
• Look at the top 2 cards of your deck, place any number of them on top of your deck in any order and the remaining to the Outside Area. Then, you may "Play 1 red <Denji> with a required energy of 1 or less from your Outside Area to your Energy Line in active, and place this card face-down under the <Denji>".@
• Place this card face-down under your <Denji> on your area that has no face-down cards. If the <Denji> is not in raid state, set 1 of your AP cards to active.
_triggerText: Active 1 of your character and give it +3000BP during this turn.

name: ... Kon.
effect:
This card can only be used if there is a <Aki Hayakawa> on your area.@
Choose 1 character on your opponent's Front Line with BP 5000 or less and retire it. You may place 1 face-down card under <Aki Hayakawa> on your area to the Outside Area.
_triggerText: Choose one of your opponent's Frontline characters and retire it.

name: The Strongest Bread
effect: Draw [2] cards. If there is a <Hayakawa House> on your area or if there is a face-down card under a <Denji> on your area, it's [3] instead.
_triggerText: Draw a card.

name: It Was A Promise.
effect: Choose up to 2 of your AP cards and set them to active.
_triggerText: If you have no life: place the top card of your deck into your life area.

name: I Like Bad Guys, You Know~?
effect: Choose 1 character on your opponent's Front Line with [BP 3000 or less] and retire it. If there is a <Denji> on your area, it's [BP 5000 or less] instead.
_triggerText: Choose one of your opponent's Frontline characters and retire it.
